heading: Data collection on attrition in intelligence community
label: 3334h Data collection on attrition in intelligence community
notes: Amendments2024—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c) which required annual reports to Congress regarding workforce and candidate attrition in the intelligence community.Pub. L. 118–159
DefinitionsFor definition of “intelligence community” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. W of Pub. L. 116–260section 3003 of this title
amendments: Amendments2024—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c) which required annual reports to Congress regarding workforce and candidate attrition in the intelligence community.Pub. L. 118–159

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Director of National Intelligence shall establish standards for collecting data relating to attrition in the intelligence community workforce across demographics, specialities, and length of service.December 27, 2020

children.heading: Inclusion of certain candidates
children.label: 2 Inclusion of certain candidates
children.text: The Director shall include, in the standards established under paragraph (1), standards for collecting data from candidates who accepted conditional offers of employment but chose to withdraw from the hiring process before entering into service, including data with respect to the reasons such candidates chose to withdraw.

children.heading: Collection of data
children.label: b Collection of data
children.text: Not later than 120 days after , each element of the intelligence community shall begin collecting data on workforce and candidate attrition in accordance with the standards established under subsection (a).December 27, 2020
